LanguageData.FB_SkillQuintessenceInvalidContents: This quintessence contains no usable skill.
LanguageData.FB_SkillQuintessenceCompressTooltip: Compress stored skill points into a single-use quintessence. Each point becomes {0} XP. One item can hold up to {1} XP.
LanguageData.FB_SkillQuintessenceInvalidLevels: A quintessence can contain from 1 to {0} stored skill points.
LanguageData.FB_SkillQuintessenceWombUnavailable: The symbiosis brood womb is unavailable.
LanguageData.FB_SkillQuintessenceDefMissing: The skill quintessence definition is unavailable.
LanguageData.FB_SkillQuintessenceNoPlace: There is no space near the womb for the quintessence.
LanguageData.FB_SkillQuintessenceMaxLevel: {0} is already at its maximum base level.
LanguageData.FB_SkillQuintessenceUsed: {USER_labelShort} absorbed {1} quintessence, gaining {2} XP. Base level: {3} -> {4}.
